paper.notes: Extracted all 65 visible Table 4 strength rows from page text.

conditions.rh_pct: lime-saturated water then 65 +/- 5% RH for 90-day specimens
conditions.curing_method: Demoulded after 24 h; lime-saturated water to 28 days; 90-day specimens then curing room

evidence.evidence_text: M1-M43 used 550 kg/m3 binder and w/b 0.32; M44-M65 used 450 kg/m3 binder and w/b 0.44. Replacement ratios: FA and GGBFS 20,40,60%; SF and MK 5,10,15% by total binder.
Table 4 reports mix ID and compressive strength at 28 and 90 days in MPa for M1-M65.
Six 150 mm cube samples were produced; after 24 h demoulded and stored in lime saturated water until 28 days; remaining samples kept at 20 +/- 2 C and 65 +/- 5% RH until 90 days; ASTM C39.
